description: JStock is open on the Portfolio Management tab showing existing buy transactions for AAPL, MSFT, and NVDA. Update the existing Microsoft (MSFT) transaction (50 units purchased Jan 15, 2024) with a Broker Fee of 9.99, a Clearing Fee of 0.03, and the comment 'Q1 2024 core holding'. Save the changes to the portfolio while leaving all other fields and transactions unchanged.
